cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A bustling metropolis that seamlessly blends ultra-modern neon-lit skyscrapers with historic temples.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: Famed for its classical Buddhist temples, gardens, imperial palaces, and traditional wooden houses.

cities.name: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
cities.description: A huge seaside city in Brazil, famed for its Copacabana and Ipanema beaches.

cities.name: São Paulo, Brazil
cities.description: Brazil's vibrant financial center, renowned for its incredible cultural institutions and rich architectural tradition.

temples.name: Taj Mahal, India
temples.description: An immense mausoleum of white marble, built in Agra between 1631 and 1648.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: A gigantic temple complex in Cambodia, originally constructed as a Hindu temple for the Khmer Empire.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: A small South Pacific island famous for its luxury resorts and beautiful beaches.

beaches.name: Navagio Beach, Greece
beaches.description: An exposed cove on the coast of Zakynthos, renowned for its crystal clear water and a shipwreck.
